title: Dichasianthus runcinatus
intro: Dichasianthus runcinatus, also known as Rungia runcinata, is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress and improving immune function. The bioactive constituents of Dichasianthus runcinatus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Dichasianthus runcinatus include teas, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments and support overall well-being.
